summary: Payment Recovery Script & Toggle Endpoint Testing - 100% PASS. All 24 backend tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working. The new Payment Recovery Script correctly rebuilds paidAmount, dueAmount, paymentStatus from receipt_allocations. The modified toggle endpoint (Step 8) creates payment + receipt_allocation when marking unpaid→paid.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: GET /api/data-audit/recovery/preview returns step2_4 and step5 sections with correct data
Good: step2_4 calculates from receipt_allocations (authoritative source)
Good: step5 correctly excludes cash sales (no change evidence = likely cash sale at counter)
Good: POST /api/data-audit/recovery/execute requires changedBy for audit trail
Good: GET /api/data-audit/recovery/validate returns 4 validation checks as specified
Good: PATCH toggle endpoint creates payment record (PAY-TOGGLE-xxx) when marking unpaid→paid
Good: PATCH toggle endpoint creates receipt_allocation linking payment to order
Good: Toggle paid→unpaid correctly reverses (soft-deletes allocation, deletes payment)
Good: Frontend shows Payment Recovery Script card on Dashboard tab
Good: Frontend preview shows step2_4 and step5 changes with cash sale exclusion
Good: Execute button only appears when preview has changes
Good: Validation shows 4 checks with PASS/FAIL status
seed_data_creation: Toggle operations on CRASH-TEST-002 order during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment Recovery Script fully tested. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/data-audit/recovery/preview returns step2_4 (from allocations) and step5 (no-allocation resets with cash sale exclusion), 2) POST /api/data-audit/recovery/execute requires changedBy and creates audit logs, 3) GET /api/data-audit/recovery/validate returns 4 checks (paid/zero, negative due, sum=total, status matches amounts), 4) PATCH toggle creates payment+allocation on unpaid→paid (Step 8 enforcement), 5) Frontend shows all sections correctly.

GET /api/data-audit/recovery/validate - has allPassed flag

POST /api/data-audit/recovery/execute - rejects empty changedBy
PATCH toggle - requires changedBy

PATCH toggle - validates newStatus (paid/unpaid only)
PATCH toggle - unpaid→paid successfully updates order
PATCH toggle - unpaid→paid creates payment + receipt_allocation (Step 8)
